data-reactid="1179"></path></svg></div></div></div><h2 data-reactid="1180"><!-- react-text: 1181 -->Hasan Minhaj<!-- /react-text --></h2><span class="_33STToOS" data-reactid="1182"><!-- react-text: 1183 -->By <!-- /react-text --><!-- react-text: 1184 -->Trevor Noah<!-- /react-text --></span></div><div class="TGuGEreH" data-reactid="1185"><div class="_39bqaZu_" data-reactid="1186"><img src="https://api.time.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/04/hasan-minhaj-time-100-2019.jpg?quality=85&amp;zoom=2" alt="Hasan Minhaj comedian, writer, producer, political commentator, actor, and television host" data-reactid="1187"/><span class="_2x1S2uJI" data-reactid="1188">► Watch</span></div><span class="_33Bfr_Gu" data-reactid="1189">Matthew Tammaro for TIME</span></div></div><div class="_3MbUJWWG" data-reactid="1190"></div></div><div class="_3axI0LFq" data-reactid="1191"><p>When I first met Hasan Minhaj in 2014, we had just been hired to work together at <i>The Daily Show with Jon Stewart. </i>We were both fresh-faced kids trying to find our voice in the fast-paced world of late-night television. Fast-forward five years later, Hasan is still as fresh-faced as ever, but his voice booms across screens around the world, thanks to his groundbreaking Netflix show <i>Patriot Act with Hasan Minhaj.</i></p>
<p>After hosting the White House Correspondents&rsquo; Dinner and releasing his stand-up special <i>Hasan Minhaj: Homecoming King </i>in 2017, the opportunity for a late-night show of his own wasn&rsquo;t just obvious, it was necessary. We&rsquo;ve needed Hasan&rsquo;s voice since Donald Trump came down that golden escalator and turned immigrants and Muslims into his targets.</p>
<p>See, Hasan is a first-generation, Indian-American Muslim. But Hasan also loves the NBA, struggles with a &ldquo;crippling&rdquo; sneaker habit and speaks fluent hip-hop. <i>Patriot Act</i> is the manifestation of Hasan&rsquo;s whip-smart commentary, charisma and sincerity. It&rsquo;s also a consistent reminder that Hasan is America. And America is Hasan.</p>
<p><i>Noah is the host of</i> The Daily Show</p>
<p><em>Hasan Minhaj was part of TIME&rsquo;s <a href="http://time.com/collection-post/5414040/hasan-minhaj-next-generation-leaders/"  target="_blank" rel="noopener">2018 Next Generation Leaders</a> series.</em></p>

Minhaj"},"content":{"rendered":"\u003Cp\u003EWhen I first met Hasan Minhaj in 2014, we had just been hired to work together at \u003Ci\u003EThe Daily Show with Jon Stewart. \u003C\u002Fi\u003EWe were both fresh-faced kids trying to find our voice in the fast-paced world of late-night television. Fast-forward five years later, Hasan is still as fresh-faced as ever, but his voice booms across screens around the world, thanks to his groundbreaking Netflix show \u003Ci\u003EPatriot Act with Hasan Minhaj.\u003C\u002Fi\u003E\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003EAfter hosting the White House Correspondents&rsquo; Dinner and releasing his stand-up special \u003Ci\u003EHasan Minhaj: Homecoming King \u003C\u002Fi\u003Ein 2017, the opportunity for a late-night show of his own wasn&rsquo;t just obvious, it was necessary. We&rsquo;ve needed Hasan&rsquo;s voice since Donald Trump came down that golden escalator and turned immigrants and Muslims into his targets.\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003ESee, Hasan is a first-generation, Indian-American Muslim. But Hasan also loves the NBA, struggles with a &ldquo;crippling&rdquo; sneaker habit and speaks fluent hip-hop. \u003Ci\u003EPatriot Act\u003C\u002Fi\u003E is the manifestation of Hasan&rsquo;s whip-smart commentary, charisma and sincerity. It&rsquo;s also a consistent reminder that Hasan is America. And America is Hasan.\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Ci\u003ENoah is the host of\u003C\u002Fi\u003E The Daily Show\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E\u003Cem\u003EHasan Minhaj was part of TIME&rsquo;s \u003Ca href=\"http:\u002F\u002Ftime.com\u002Fcollection-post\u002F5414040\u002Fhasan-minhaj-next-generation-leaders\u002F\"  target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener\"\u003E2018 Next Generation Leaders\u003C\u002Fa\u003E series.\u003C\u002Fem\u003E\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n","protected":false,"structured":[{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":["When I first met Hasan Minhaj in 2014, we had just been hired to work together at ",{"tag":"i","attributes":[],"content":["The Daily Show with Jon Stewart. "]},"We were both fresh-faced kids trying to find our voice in the fast-paced world of late-night television. Fast-forward five years later, Hasan is still as fresh-faced as ever, but his voice booms across screens around the world, thanks to his groundbreaking Netflix show ",{"tag":"i","attributes":[],"content":["Patriot Act with Hasan Minhaj."]}]},{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":["After hosting the White House Correspondents’ Dinner and releasing his stand-up special ",{"tag":"i","attributes":[],"content":["Hasan Minhaj: Homecoming King "]},"in 2017, the opportunity for a late-night show of his own wasn’t just obvious, it was necessary. We’ve needed Hasan’s voice since Donald Trump came down that golden escalator and turned immigrants and Muslims into his targets."]},{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":["See, Hasan is a first-generation, Indian-American Muslim. But Hasan also loves the NBA, struggles with a “crippling” sneaker habit and speaks fluent hip-hop. ",{"tag":"i","attributes":[],"content":["Patriot Act"]}," is the manifestation of Hasan’s whip-smart commentary, charisma and sincerity. It’s also a consistent reminder that Hasan is America. And America is Hasan."]},{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":[{"tag":"i","attributes":[],"content":["Noah is the host of"]}," The Daily Show"]},{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":[{"tag":"em","attributes":[],"content":["Hasan Minhaj was part of TIME’s ",{"tag":"a","attributes":{"href":"http:\u002F\u002Ftime.com\u002Fcollection-post\u002F5414040\u002Fhasan-minhaj-next-generation-leaders\u002F","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener"},"content":["2018 Next Generation Leaders"]}," series."]}]}],"plain":"When I first met Hasan Minhaj in 2014, we had just been hired to work together at The Daily Show with Jon Stewart. We were both fresh-faced kids trying to find our voice in the fast-paced world of late-night television. Fast-forward five years later, Hasan is still as fresh-faced as ever, but his voice booms across screens around the world, thanks to his groundbreaking Netflix show Patriot Act with Hasan Minhaj. After hosting the White House Correspondents&rsquo; Dinner and releasing his stand-up special Hasan Minhaj: Homecoming King in 2017, the opportunity for a late-night show of his own wasn&rsquo;t just obvious, it was necessary. We&rsquo;ve needed Hasan&rsquo;s voice since Donald Trump came down that golden escalator and turned immigrants and Muslims into his targets. See, Hasan is a first-generation, Indian-American Muslim. But Hasan also loves the NBA, struggles with a &ldquo;crippling&rdquo; sneaker habit and speaks fluent hip-hop. Patriot Act is the manifestation of Hasan&rsquo;s whip-smart commentary, charisma and sincerity. It&rsquo;s also a consistent reminder that Hasan is America. And America is Hasan. Noah is the host of The Daily Show Hasan Minhaj was part of TIME&rsquo;s 2018 Next Generation Leaders n":[{"embeddable":true,"href":"https:\u002F\u002Fapi.time.com\u002Fwp-json\u002Fti-api\u002Fv1\u002Ftime_collection_post\u002F5567530\u002Fprimary_section"}],"fortune:primary_topic":[{"embeddable":true,"href":"https:\u002F\u002Fapi.time.com\u002Fwp-json\u002Fti-api\u002Fv1\u002Ftime_collection_post\u002F5567530\u002Fprimary_topic"}],"ng:more:brand":[{"embeddable":true,"href":"https:\u002F\u002Fapi.time.com\u002Fwp-json\u002Fti-api\u002Fv1\u002Ftime_collection_post\u002F5567530\u002Fbrand"}],"ng:authors":[{"embeddable":true,"href":"https:\u002F\u002Fapi.time.com\u002Fwp-json\u002Fti-api\u002Fv1\u002Fauthors?post=5567530"}],"fortune:bucket":[{"embeddable":true,"href":"https:\u002F\u002Fapi.time.com\u002Fwp-json\u002Fti-api\u002Fv1\u002Ftime_bucket\u002F5567530\u002Fbucket"}],"fortune:franchise":[{"embeddable":true,"href":"https:\u002F\u002Fapi.time.com\u002Fwp-json\u002Fti-api\u002Fv1\u002Ftime_bucket\u002F5567530\u002Ffranchise"}]}}],"fortune:franchise":[{"id":5512528,"date":"2019-01-24T16:20:38","date_gmt":"2019-01-24T21:20:38","guid":{"rendered":"http:\u002F\u002Ftime.com\u002F?post_type=time_collection&#038;p=5512528"},"modified":"2019-01-24T16:20:38","modified_gmt":"2019-01-24T21:20:38","slug":"","status":"draft","type":"time_collection","link":"https:\u002F\u002Ftime.com\u002F?post_type=time_collection&p=5512528","title":{"rendered":""},"content":{"rendered":"\u003Cp\u003EAntonio Guterres\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003ESecretary General of the United Nations\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E&nbsp;\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003Emost important systemic race for the near future.\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003EI think we are losing the race. Climate change is running faster that what we are\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003EWe need to be able to address the concerns of these people\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E&nbsp;\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003EAustrian Federal Chancellor \u003Ca href=\"http:\u002F\u002Ftime.com\u002F5466497\u002Fsebastian-kurz\u002F\" \u003ESebastian Kurz\u003C\u002Fa\u003E, a conservative best known for fostering an alliance between his party and the country&#8217;s far right, spoke of the success of one of his big initiatives- reducing migration into Austria.\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E&nbsp;\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E95% fewer arrivals\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003Emigration\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003Egetting Northern Africa to help rescue people from the Mediterranean\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003Edefer date of Britain leaving E.U. to assure that there isn&#8217;t a &#8220;hard Brexit.&#8221;\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E&#8220;I will plead that we do everything to avoid a hard Brexit. This would not only damage the U.K. but be very damaging to Europe as well.\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E&nbsp;\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003EChrystia Freeland\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003EOne of my colleagues who had been in a previous liberal cabinet, he was sitting beside me and he said, you know, it&#8217;s really interesting prime minister, but in the previous cabinets I&#8217;ve been a minister in, it was incredibly confrontational, people yelling at each other&#8230; I don&#8217;t know why it&#8217;s different that way.\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003EAll of the women in the room just laughed, and we said- because it&#8217;s 50% women could be a reason\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E&nbsp;\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003EMichelle Bachelet\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003EI never wanted to be a president of the republic.\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003EDidn&#8217;t take her seriously when she was a minister of health. Seemed to be feminine role because it emphasized caring for others\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003Eminister of defense, picture of her riding a tank\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n\u003Cp\u003E&#8220;But when I became prime minister of defense- this started changing things.&#8221;\u003C\u002Fp\u003E\n","protected":false,"structured":[{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":["Antonio Guterres"]},{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":["Secretary General of the United Nations"]},{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":["most important systemic race for the near future."]},{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":["I think we are losing the race. Climate change is running faster that what we are"]},{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":["We need to be able to address the concerns of these people"]},{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":["Austrian Federal Chancellor ",{"tag":"a","attributes":{"href":"http:\u002F\u002Ftime.com\u002F5466497\u002Fsebastian-kurz\u002F"},"content":["Sebastian Kurz"]},", a conservative best known for fostering an alliance between his party and the country's far right, spoke of the success of one of his big initiatives- reducing migration into Austria."]},{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":["95% fewer arrivals"]},{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":["migration"]},{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":["getting Northern Africa to help rescue people from the Mediterranean"]},{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":["defer date of Britain leaving E.U. to assure that there isn't a \"hard Brexit.\""]},{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":["\"I will plead that we do everything to avoid a hard Brexit. This would not only damage the U.K. but be very damaging to Europe as well."]},{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":["Chrystia Freeland"]},{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":["One of my colleagues who had been in a previous liberal cabinet, he was sitting beside me and he said, you know, it's really interesting prime minister, but in the previous cabinets I've been a minister in, it was incredibly confrontational, people yelling at each other... I don't know why it's different that way."]},{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":["All of the women in the room just laughed, and we said- because it's 50% women could be a reason"]},{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":["Michelle Bachelet"]},{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":["I never wanted to be a president of the republic."]},{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":["Didn't take her seriously when she was a minister of health. Seemed to be feminine role because it emphasized caring for others"]},{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":["minister of defense, picture of her riding a tank"]},{"tag":"p","attributes":[],"content":["\"But when I became prime minister of defense- this started changing things.\""]}],"plain":"Antonio Guterres Secretary General of the United Nations &nbsp; most important systemic race for the near future. I think we are losing the race. Climate change is running faster that what we are We need to be able to address the concerns of these people &nbsp; Austrian Federal Chancellor Sebastian Kurz, a conservative best known for fostering an alliance between his party and the country&#8217;s far right, spoke of the success of one of his big initiatives- reducing migration into Austria. &nbsp; 95% fewer arrivals migration getting Northern Africa to help rescue people from the Mediterranean defer date of Britain leaving E.U. to assure that there isn&#8217;t a &#8220;hard Brexit.&#8221; &#8220;I will plead that we do everything to avoid a hard Brexit. This would not only damage the U.K. but be very damaging to Europe as well. &nbsp; Chrystia Freeland One of my colleagues who had been in a previous liberal cabinet, he was sitting beside me and he said, you know, it&#8217;s really interesting prime minister, but in the previous cabinets I&#8217;ve been a minister in, it was incredibly confrontational, people yelling at each other&#8230; I don&#8217;t know why it&#8217;s different that way. All of the women in the room just laughed, and we said- because it&#8217;s 50% women could be a reason &nbsp; Michelle Bachelet I never wanted to be a president of the republic. Didn&#8217;t take her seriously when she was a minister of health. Seemed to be feminine role because it emphasized caring for others minister of defense, picture of her riding a tank &#8220;But when I became prime minister of defense- this started changing things.&#8221;"},"featured_media":0,"template":"","meta":[],"time_section":[],"tags":[],"primary_time_section":[],"parsely":{"version":"1.1.0","canonical_url":"https:\u002F\u002Ftime.com\u002F?post_type=time_collection&p=5512528","smart_links":{"inbound":0,"outbound":0},"traffic_boost_suggestions_count":0,"meta":[],"rendered":"","tracker_url":"https:\u002F\u002Fcdn.parsely.com\u002Fkeys\u002Ftime.com\u002Fp.js"},"jetpack_sharing_enabled":true,"collection_type":"hub","single_package":false,"paid":false,"display_modified_time":false,"_links":{"wp:meta":[{"embeddable":true,"href":"https:\u002F\u002Fapi.time.com\u002Fwp-json\u002Fti-api\u002Fv1\u002Ftime_collection\u002F5512528\u002Fmeta"}],"fortune:primary_tag":[{"embeddable":true,"href":"https:\u002F\u002Fapi.time.com\u002Fwp-json\u002Fti-api\u002Fv1\u002Ftime_collection\u002F5512528\u002Fprimary_tag"}]},"_embedded":{"wp:meta":[{"bitly_url":"https:\u002F\u002Ftime.com\u002F?post_type=time_collection&p=5512528","negative_coverage":false,"permalink":"https:\u002F\u002Ftime.com\u002F?post_type=time_collection&p=5512528","mt_seo_title":"","is_mt_seo_title_a_fallback":true,"is_og_title_a_fallback":true,"og_title":"","is_mt_seo_description_a_fallback":true,"mt_seo_description":"Antonio Guterres Secretary General of the United Nations &nbsp; most important systemic race for the near future.
